title: Finvary
description: adds a touch of randomness to the game by adjusting the size and health of fish entities when they spawn
body:
introduces randomness to fish entities by altering their size and health attributes as they spawn

![random](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/605dede1437f0331b84cdb4b0c9e81ddd0fc6814.png)
